title: cyclosorus arcuatus
intro: Cyclosorus arcuatus, also known as the curved lip fern or bent lip fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Cyclosorus arcuatus include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and in some cases, its dried leaves are used in the form of a powder for oral consumption or as a topical application.
